# MCPStarfleetCommand

MCPStarfleetCommand is an enhanced Model Context Protocol server with an LCARS dashboard, REST API, and analytics tooling.

Primary docs:
- README: /README.md
- Quickstart: /QUICKSTART.md
- Architecture: /ARCHITECTURE.md
- Cheatsheet: /CHEATSHEET.md
- Docker guide: /DOCKER-README.md

Entry points:
- Landing page: /
- Dashboard: /dashboard
- Modules hub: /pages/index.html

API references:
- Status: /api/status
- Tools list: /api/tools
- Tool execution: /api/tools/execute
